nasb.text: But when the day was now breaking, Jesus stood on the beach; yet the disciples did not know that it was Jesus.

esv.text: Just as day was breaking, Jesus stood on the shore; yet the disciples did not know that it was Jesus.

cnv.text: 清早的時候，耶穌站在岸邊；門徒卻不知道他就是耶穌。

ccb.text: 天将破晓的时候，耶稣站在岸上，但门徒都不知道是耶稣。

csbs.text: 天快亮的时候，耶稣站在岸上，只是门徒们没有认出他就是耶稣。
